letter_excerpt: Not legal or medical advice. Draft assistance only. This is a draft for review by a person before filing. Disclaimer: This letter is for administrative appeal purposes and does not constitute medical advice. To Aetna Behavioral Health Utilization Management: I am writing to formally appeal the denial of my prior authorization request for a 3 to 5 day inpatient medical detoxification admission to treat alcohol use disorder.
